items.title: # Plan Trip Itinerary
items.content: Ask AI to create a detailed daily itinerary for your destination, including activities and estimated times. Specify your interests and budget for a personalized travel plan.

items.title: # Find Local Eateries
items.content: Prompt AI for recommendations on authentic local restaurants or hidden attractions near your hotel. Include your dietary preferences or specific interests for tailored suggestions.

items.title: # Generate Packing List
items.content: Have AI generate a packing list based on your destination, trip duration, and planned activities. It can even suggest items based on local weather forecasts.

items.title: #Personalized Workout Plans
items.content: Ask AI to create a workout routine tailored to your goals and available equipment. It can suggest exercises, sets, and reps for you.

items.title: #Meal Prep Ideas
items.content: Use AI to generate healthy meal ideas based on your dietary preferences or restrictions. It can help you plan your weekly grocery list efficiently.

items.title: #Summarize Health Articles
items.content: Paste long health articles or research papers into an AI to get quick summaries. Understand complex information faster without reading everything.

items.title: #VerifyAIFacts
items.content: AI can sometimes invent information, known as hallucination. Always double-check critical details with reliable sources before trusting them, especially for important decisions.

items.title: #ChallengeAIAnswers
items.content: If an AI sounds too confident but feels off, ask it for its sources or to explain its reasoning step-by-step. This helps uncover made-up details or logical errors.

items.title: #BroadenAIPerspective
items.content: AI's answers reflect its training data, which can have biases or be incomplete. Provide specific context or ask for opposing viewpoints to get a more balanced and accurate response.

items.title: #Digest Long Emails
items.content: Use an AI agent to quickly read through lengthy email threads or documents and extract key decisions. This saves time sifting through details, letting you focus on what truly matters.

items.title: #Format Messy Data
items.content: Deploy an AI agent to clean up inconsistent spreadsheet data, standardize formats, or categorize information automatically. It transforms raw data into usable formats, reducing manual effort and

items.title: #Generate Fresh Ideas
items.content: Engage an AI agent to brainstorm diverse ideas for projects, campaigns, or problem-solving by offering various perspectives. This helps overcome creative blocks and expands your thought process

items.title: #DebugCodeFaster
items.content: Stuck on an error? Ask AI to review your code and suggest fixes. It can quickly pinpoint issues and explain solutions, saving you hours of frustration.

items.title: #GenerateBoilerplateCode
items.content: Need a quick script or a basic function? Describe what you need in plain language. AI can generate starting code, giving you a strong foundation to build upon.

items.title: #UnderstandComplexCode
items.content: Encountered unfamiliar code? Paste it into an AI tool and ask for an explanation. It can break down complex logic into simple terms, helping you learn faster.

items.title: #Summarize Any Text
items.content: Paste long articles or notes into an AI tool and ask for a summary. This quickly extracts key points, saving you time and helping you grasp core ideas faster.

items.title: #Explain Complex Ideas
items.content: Input a difficult concept or jargon into AI and ask it to explain it simply. It breaks down complex topics into easy-to-understand language, perfect for quick learning.

items.title: #Generate Study Questions
items.content: Feed your study materials into an AI and ask it to create quiz questions or flashcards. This helps test your understanding and reinforces what you've learned effectively.

items.title: # Practice Interview Answers
items.content: Use AI to simulate common interview questions and generate example answers. This helps you refine your responses and build confidence before the big day.

items.title: # Tailor Your Resume
items.content: Input the job description into an AI tool and ask it to highlight keywords. Then, use these insights to optimize your resume and cover letter for that specific role.

items.title: # Draft Follow-Up Emails
items.content: After an interview, ask AI to draft a professional and personalized thank-you email. Provide key details from your conversation to make it unique and impactful.
